taskName: Release blocker fix - remove FileEasy monitor entry
goal: Remove the monitor-dashboard entry from the FileEasy shell so the APK homepage returns to the approved pure service-shell boundary without introducing unrelated scope changes.
nonGoals: Do not expand product scope beyond the approved PRD.
Do not bundle unrelated UI cleanup or monitor feature refactors.
Do not modify PRD or design documents.

acceptanceChecks.text: The FileEasy homepage no longer exposes the monitor dashboard entry or path, and the shell returns to the approved upload-QR / upload-address / admin-entry / password-entry boundary.
Removing the monitor entry does not reintroduce player-facing UI and does not break the existing FileEasy admin entry behavior.

handoffQuestions: List only remaining blocker-level risks that still require PM review after the FileEasy monitor entry is removed.
